name: gameengine
description: Clean C++ game engine with AI-driven game development workflow.

asset-importers.description: Optional production asset importer dependencies for PNG, glTF, KTX2/Basis texture review, and common audio source decoding.

desktop-runtime.description: Optional Windows native desktop game runtime lane. Win32, WASAPI, DXGI, and D3D12 integration uses the host SDK and declares no vcpkg package dependency.

physics-jolt.description: Optional native 3D physics middleware adapter dependency for Jolt Physics.

network-enet.description: Optional ENet loopback network transport adapter dependency.

desktop-gui.description: Optional Windows native desktop editor shell lane. Dear ImGui is available only for developer/editor tooling through Win32 and DirectX 12 backends; SDL3 bindings remain excluded.
